scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:server && npm run build:web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace @competitors/server run typecheck && npm --workspace @competitors/web run typecheck
scripts.dev:server: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace @competitors/server run dev
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:shared && npm --workspace @competitors/web run dev
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.app: npm run app:build && npm run app:start
